summary: Subtask 003 passed review. Codex created 5 collection-specific templates and a quick-reference guide that accurately mirror the site's existing conventions. Reviewer independently verified: (1) all 5 templates have valid YAML front matter with fields in the exact order (layout, title, date, categories, comments) matching real content files; (2) template body structures faithfully reproduce real content patterns — posts use blockquote→separator→sectioned headings with code/math, figs/shots use <div class='gallery'> with Liquid-prefixed image paths, vlogs use Bilibili iframe in <div class='video'> wrapper; (3) all templates include required HTML guidance comments for filename, categories, and asset paths; (4) quick-reference covers all 6 required sections with accurate conventions. Jekyll build verification could not complete due to the same Bundler 2.5.7 environment mismatch documented in subtask 002 — this is non-blocking. No site files were modified and the temporary test post was properly cleaned up.
evidence: Reviewer ran Python YAML validation on all 5 templates — all PASS with correct layout values (post, blog, fig, shot, vlog) and field order matching existing content
Reviewer cross-checked post-template.md against _posts/2024-08-29-Developed-QYtool.md — front matter fields/order identical, body structure (blockquote, separator, sectioned headings) matches

Reviewer cross-checked fig-template.md against _figs/2024-03-29-Logo.md —
,

/ pattern, and {{ '/' | relative_url }} Liquid prefix all match precisely
Reviewer cross-checked shot-template.md against _shots/2023-03-23-Daily-life.md — gallery structure, image path pattern (public/shots/YYYY-MM-DD-slug/), and width attributes match
Reviewer cross-checked vlog-template.md against _vlogs/2024-01-02-Bye-Bye-2023.md — Bilibili link, <div class='video'> wrapper, and iframe src pattern all match
Reviewer cross-checked blog-template.md against _blogs/2024-04-05-DeePC-WWTPs.md — front matter, category format (space-separated), and body structure match
Reviewer verified quick-reference.md has all 6 required sections: collection usage, filename patterns, front matter fields table, asset paths, category naming rules, common pitfalls
Reviewer verified git diff shows no changes to site files (_posts/, _blogs/, _figs/, _shots/, _vlogs/, _layouts/, _includes/, _config.yml, public/)
Reviewer confirmed _posts/2099-01-01-Template-Test.md does not exist (cleanup successful)
All 9 output artifacts present: 5 templates, quick-reference.md, jekyll-build.log, result.md, output_manifest.json

issues_found.description: Jekyll build verification failed with the same Bundler 2.5.7 environment mismatch as subtask 002. This is an inherent environment limitation — the site builds remotely via GitHub Pages, not locally. Non-blocking.
Vlog template iframe is not indented inside <div class='video'>, while the real vlog file indents it. Purely cosmetic, no functional impact.

acceptance_check.criterion: One template per collection type with correct layout and front matter fields
acceptance_check.evidence: 5 templates exist (post, blog, fig, shot, vlog), each with correct layout value and all 5 required fields

acceptance_check.criterion: Templates use exact field names, ordering, and formatting from existing content
acceptance_check.evidence: Python validation confirmed field order layout→title→date→categories→comments matches all existing content files
All 5 templates have HTML comments for: save-as filename, known categories, asset path guidance, and additional collection-specific tips

acceptance_check.criterion: Templates follow YYYY-MM-DD-Slug.md naming convention with instructions
acceptance_check.evidence: Each template's first comment reads '<!-- Save as: YYYY-MM-DD-Your-Title.md in _<collection>/ -->'

acceptance_check.criterion: Quick-reference guide covers when to use each collection and key conventions
acceptance_check.evidence: 6 sections present: collection usage, filename patterns, front matter table, asset paths, category naming, common pitfalls — all accurate

stop_conditions: Skill file skill_qyweb_editing.md created with standard skill format (Purpose, Triggers, Procedure, Do/Don't, Examples)
Skill covers all 5 collection types with step-by-step creation instructions
Skill includes inline templates for each collection type from subtask 003
Skill includes condensed conventions reference from subtask 001
Skill deployed to all 4 required locations: subtask dir, /Users/qy/.claude/skills/, /Users/qy/.codex/skills/, and backup workflow settings path
Skill content verified against site-conventions.md for accuracy
No existing site files or subtask 001-003 outputs modified
